user_prompt:
User goal:
Review PR #482. Run all the checks for me — lint, tests, security scan, and
count how many lines changed. If anything fails or looks risky, post a
summary to #code-reviews. Otherwise just approve it.


Available tools:
- run_lint(pr_id: string) — Run linter on PR. Returns issue count and errors.
- run_tests(pr_id: string) — Run test suite for PR. Returns pass/fail counts.
- check_security(pr_id: string) — Run security scanner on PR. Returns vulnerability list.
- count_loc_change(pr_id: string) — Count lines added and removed in PR.
- post_to_slack(channel: string, message: string) — Post a message to a Slack channel.
- approve_pr(pr_id: string) — Approve a PR for merge.

Produce the plan now.
